product_overview: Ambra is an integrated educational fintech platform designed to streamline financial management, school canteen control, and dietary intelligence into a unified ecosystem serving schools, families, and governments. Combining cutting-edge multi-tenant architecture with compliance-driven features, Ambra empowers stakeholders with administrative consoles, real-time analytics, and seamless payment integrations tailored for the Brazilian educational environment.
core_goals: Provide a comprehensive financial and operational management system for schools and canteens adapting to multi-tenant, multi-role environments.
Enable secure and user-friendly registration and authentication workflows for school managers and canteen operators with compliant legal consent mechanisms.
Integrate real-time address verification and data validation using ViaCEP and Zod to ensure data accuracy and compliance.
Deliver differentiated dashboards for managers and canteen operators enhancing usability according to role-specific needs.
Support robust compliance with legal requirements including LGPD (data protection), KYC, and fiscal regulations for educational institutions and government entities.
Deploy scalable, audited, and AI-assisted backend infrastructure to handle a large volume of transactions and user interactions efficiently.
Embed financial services including PIX payments and automated split payments for canteens integrated within the platform ecosystem.
key_features: Multi-step Registration Process incorporating profile selection (School Manager or Canteen Operator), detailed user and business information, and financial setup with comprehensive field validations including masks and ViaCEP address lookup.

Role-specific login pages: standard dashboard layout for managers and POS-oriented layout for canteen operators, both utilizing a unified authentication service supporting token management and mock adapters for development.
Legal Consent Modal enforcing mandatory reading and acceptance of Terms of Use and Privacy Policy with scroll detection to ensure compliance.
Centralized Auth Service managing registration, login, token lifecycle, and secure session handling across roles.
Integration with external API (ViaCEP) for real-time address retrieval to improve user experience and data quality during registration.
Use of modern frontend technologies including Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Hook Form ensuring a responsive and performant user interface.
Incorporation of data validation schema via Zod for strong client-side and server-side input validation and error handling.
Notification system (Sonner) for real-time feedback during authentication and registration workflows.
user_flow_summary: User lands on registration page and selects profile type (School Manager or Canteen Operator).
User proceeds through a multi-step form capturing personal details, entity/business data, and financial setup with real-time validation and address autofill.
User reviews and accepts mandatory legal consent modal ensuring compliance before completing registration.
User receives confirmation and activation status, with options to proceed to login.
User logs in via role-appropriate interface: managers access comprehensive dashboards; operators get POS-focused interfaces.
Upon successful login, users can navigate their respective dashboards to manage financial, operational, and administrative tasks per their roles.
Session tokens are managed securely with refresh and persistence mechanisms to maintain seamless user experience.
validation_criteria: Registration forms implement Zod schema validation with tests confirming all required fields, mask formats, and ViaCEP integrations function correctly.
Legal Consent Modal enforces scroll and acceptance rules, confirmed through automated testing and manual review.
Authentication workflows successfully allow login, token management, and logout across roles with appropriate security checks.
UI components built with Tailwind CSS and React Hook Form maintain responsive behavior and accessibility standards across devices.
API integrations with ViaCEP and backend authentication services are tested with mock adapters to secure consistent data flow and error handling.
Pilot deployments achieve target usability and performance benchmarks as per Q2 2026 roadmap with scalability verified for multi-tenant scenarios.
Compliance with LGPD and fiscal regulations is audited, ensuring data privacy and lawful processing throughout all user interactions.

features.name: Register Page
features.description: Multi-step registration form for School Managers and Canteen Operators. Includes profile selection, user details, entity/business data, and financial setup. Features Zod validation, mask formatting (CPF/CNPJ/Phone/CEP), ViaCEP integration for address lookup, and mandatory legal consent modal.

features.name: Login Pages
features.description: Authentication pages for different roles. Manager login uses a standard dashboard layout, while Operator login uses a POS-focused layout. Both use the unified auth service.

features.name: Legal Components
features.description: Components for displaying and accepting legal terms (Terms of Use, Privacy Policy). Includes scroll detection for mandatory reading and centralized text data.

features.name: Auth Service
features.description: Centralized authentication service handling login, registration, and token management. Includes mock adapter for development environment.
